model.text:
By submitting this registration form, you agree to the following terms and conditions:

  1. Registration Fee: You acknowledge that a registration fee may be applicable and agree to pay it according to the specified payment terms.
  2. Course Availability: Course availability is subject to change and may be canceled if minimum enrollment requirements are not met.
  3. Cancellation Policy: Please refer to our cancellation policy for information on refund eligibility and procedures.
  4. Privacy Policy: Your personal information will be handled in accordance with our privacy policy.

Please review these terms and conditions carefully before submitting your registration.
